caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green tunic with floral embroidery and a dark necklace. In the first frame, she has her mouth closed and her right hand raised, gesturing toward her chest. In the second frame, she opens her mouth to speak and moves her hand slightly further outward. In the third frame, she continues to speak while her hand moves downward and across her torso. In the final frame, she is speaking with her right hand raised again, gesturing with her fingers spread. In the bottom left corner of each frame, there is a small logo consisting of a circular emblem and the text "NPTEL". The woman remains the central focus throughout the sequence, with only her facial expressions and hand gestures changing as she talks.
